title: Giraffe
body:
## _Featuring_
- New Camel model & textures
- Text replacements for ```English [US/UK] & Russian/Русский & Japanese/日本語```
- **Optifine** or **[ETF (Entity Texture Features)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)** ```&```
 **[EMF (Entity Model Features)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)** are **required** in order for the resource pack to function!
- Upon mounting model's head and neck will shrink for better visibility while riding in first person
